name: @gotong/example-family-learning-hub
description: 家长给孩子开 AI 订阅的家庭学习 hub — two SOVEREIGN hubs (child + guardian) federated: the child's lesson workflow orchestrates the 家长's subscription-backed AI tutor across the boundary through a topic whitelist + outbound approval gate. 管辖权 = 家长 holds the subscription + per-link contract + transcript fork; AI safety = the framework never runs an LLM, every step passes a gate. learning-records master copy lives on the child hub, forked to the 家长. Deterministic, no API key.
